prompt_template:
Rate how accurately the following statement describes you on a 7-point scale:
1: Very inaccurate
2: Moderately inaccurate
3: Slightly inaccurate
4: Neither accurate nor inaccurate
5: Slightly accurate
6: Moderately accurate
7: Very accurate
Return ONLY one integer (1-7). Do not include any other text.

Statement: I {text}.
